tasks.subject: Task 1: Source-tree deletion + edits + label sweep
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Remove every code path that calls the retired Luma direct API and every test that imports `LumaEngine`/`LumaBackend`; sweep the three peripheral test files that use `provider="luma"` as a free-form `LocalOutputSink` label. Single atomic commit.

**Files:**
- Delete: `src/kinoforge/engines/luma/__init__.py`
- Delete: `tests/engines/test_luma.py`
- Delete: `examples/configs/comparison/luma-t2v.yaml`
- Modify: `src/kinoforge/_adapters.py` (drop `engines.luma` import)
- Modify: `src/kinoforge/core/config.py` (drop `"luma"` from `KNOWN_ENGINES`)
- Modify: `tests/test_core_invariant.py` (drop `lumaai` confinement tuple)
- Modify: `tests/test_examples.py` (tighten kind set to `{"replicate","runway"}`)
- Modify: `tests/pipeline/test_generate_clip.py`, `tests/outputs/test_local.py`, `tests/outputs/test_format_filename.py` (label sweep + cascading assertions)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- engines/luma/, test_luma.py, comparison/luma-t2v.yaml gone
- 0 hits for `LumaEngine|LumaBackend|engines\.luma|engines/luma|provider="luma"` in src/tests/examples
- `import kinoforge._adapters` exits 0
- lint/format/typecheck/test/pre-commit all green
- test count exactly 13 lower than baseline
- working tree clean after commit

**Verify:** `pixi run lint && pixi run format && pixi run typecheck && pixi run test && pixi run pre-commit run --all-files`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/engines/luma/__init__.py", "tests/engines/test_luma.py", "examples/configs/comparison/luma-t2v.yaml", "src/kinoforge/_adapters.py", "src/kinoforge/core/config.py", "tests/test_core_invariant.py", "tests/test_examples.py", "tests/pipeline/test_generate_clip.py", "tests/outputs/test_local.py", "tests/outputs/test_format_filename.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run lint && pixi run format && pixi run typecheck && pixi run test && pixi run pre-commit run --all-files", "acceptanceCriteria": ["engines/luma gone", "test_luma.py gone", "luma-t2v.yaml gone", "orphan-grep returns 0", "adapter sanity import 0", "gate all green", "count drops by exactly 13", "tree clean"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: README tombstone + PROGRESS Phase 44 entry
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace README's Hosted-Bearer Luma row with a forward-pointing tombstone, strip 'Luma' from surrounding headings + prose, record Layer 5a in PROGRESS under a new Phase 44 block. Atomic commit; depends on Task 1.

**Files:**
- Modify: `README.md` (4 sites — bearer-strategy row, Hosted Bearer heading, table row, echo line)
- Modify: `PROGRESS.md` (Phase 44 block; Phase 43 Task 10 count fix; Phase 43 Task 13 DEFERRED→CLOSED; RESUME pointer sweep)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- README heading `(Replicate / Runway)` — no Luma
- Bearer-strategy row `(fal, Replicate, Runway)` — no Luma
- Bearer wire-shape table loses Luma row
- Tombstone paragraph below table points to Bedrock + Replicate + Layer 5b
- LUMAAI_API_KEY echo recommented for Layer 5b reservation
- PROGRESS Phase 44 block appended
- Phase 43 Task 10 `3 of 15` → `2 of 15` with luma-t2v.yaml removal annotation
- Phase 43 Task 13 DEFERRED → CLOSED with retirement note
- RESUME pointer swept (no-op if no Luma mention)
- pre-commit green

**Verify:** `pixi run pre-commit run --all-files` exits 0; sweep grep returns only allowed hits.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["README.md", "PROGRESS.md"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pre-commit run --all-files", "acceptanceCriteria": ["README heading drops Luma", "bearer-strategy row drops Luma", "Bearer table loses Luma row", "tombstone present", "LUMAAI_API_KEY echo recommented", "Phase 44 block appended", "Phase 43 Task 10 count fixed to 2 of 15", "Phase 43 Task 13 flipped to CLOSED", "RESUME pointer swept", "pre-commit green"]}
```
